description: Defines brand by what it WON'T do ('We don't do aggressive. We don't do gloss.'). Inverts conventional positioning.
structural_recipe: Defines brand by what it WON'T do ('We don't do aggressive. We don't do gloss.'). Inverts conventional positioning.
why_it_works: Signature of Firaasa Architect at strategic level.
transplantation_caveats: Risk of arrogance if brand can't back the refusal with real craft.
